description: Columnar drag-and-drop board with user-defined columns, count badges, and optional WIP limits

attributes.name: src
attributes.description: URL to JSON data for columns and items

childAttributes.name: data-column-label
childAttributes.description: Display label for the column header

childAttributes.name: data-wip
childAttributes.description: Optional WIP limit — visual warning when exceeded

childAttributes.name: data-column-color
childAttributes.description: Color token for column tint (success, warning, error, info)

events.name: kanban-board:wip-exceeded
events.description: Fired when a column exceeds its WIP limit
